title: Verify Log Out updates Account tab UI immediately to show Log In button
steps: 1. Launch the app and complete the onboarding flow.
5. Observe the Account tab UI immediately after tapping Log Out.
expected: After tapping Log Out, the Account tab UI updates immediately to display the Log In button without requiring the user to navigate away and back.

title: Verify Log Out does not require re-entering Account tab to reflect logged-out state
steps: 1. Launch the app and complete the onboarding flow.
5. Stay on the Account tab and verify the UI state.
expected: The Account tab shows the logged-out state (Log In button visible, user-specific details removed) immediately after Log Out, without needing to leave and re-enter the tab.

title: Verify Log Out persists logged-out state after navigating away and back to Account tab
steps: 1. Launch the app and complete the onboarding flow.
5. Navigate to a different tab (e.g., Home or Settings).
6. Navigate back to the Account tab.
expected: The Account tab still shows the Log In button and logged-out state after navigating away and back, confirming the logout action persisted correctly.

title: Verify Log Out clears user-specific data from Account tab
steps: 1. Launch the app and complete the onboarding flow.
3. Navigate to the Account tab and note user-specific details (e.g., username, email, profile info).
expected: All user-specific data (username, email, profile picture, etc.) is removed from the Account tab immediately after Log Out, and the Log In button is displayed.

title: Verify Log Out button is not visible after successful logout
steps: 1. Launch the app and complete the onboarding flow.
5. Verify the visibility of the Log Out button.
expected: The Log Out button is no longer visible on the Account tab after logging out. Only the Log In button (and optionally Sign Up) is displayed.
